login.title: Se connecter — Pytomatiza+
login.description: Connectez-vous à votre compte Pytomatiza+ pour gérer vos agents d'automatisation basés sur l'IA.

dashboard.title: Tableau de bord - Pytomatiza+
dashboard.description: Présentation de vos agents d'automatisation Pytomatiza+, de l'activité récente et de l'état du système.

agents.title: Agents - Pytomatiza+
agents.description: Parcourez et gérez vos agents d’automatisation IA.

automations.title: Automatisations — Pytomatiza+
automations.description: Créez et gérez des workflows d'automatisation du langage naturel.

settings.title: Paramètres - Pytomatiza+
settings.description: Gérez votre compte, vos intégrations et vos préférences de notification.

help.title: Aide et support — Pytomatiza+
help.description: Obtenez de l'aide, parcourez la documentation et contactez l'assistance.

logs.title: Logs & Aprovações — Pytomatiza+
logs.description: Visualize execuções de automação, histórico de agentes e gerencie aprovações pendentes.

documents.title: Documents — Pytomatiza+
documents.description: Automate document processing with AI. Extract data, convert formats, and manage PDFs, DOCX, and more.

data.title: Data & Spreadsheets — Pytomatiza+
data.description: Connect data sources, transform spreadsheets, and automate analysis with AI agents.

communication.title: Communication — Pytomatiza+
communication.description: Automate emails, messages, and multi-channel notifications with intelligent workflows.

media.title: Media & Images — Pytomatiza+
media.description: Process, convert, and optimize images and media in batch with intelligent automation.

files.title: Files — Pytomatiza+
files.description: Manage, organize, and automate file operations with intelligent rules.

architecture.title: Architecture — Pytomatiza+
architecture.description: Generate architecture diagrams, technical documentation, and system flows with AI.

settings.title: Paramètres
settings.subtitle: Gérez votre compte, vos préférences et les paramètres de votre application.

appearance.title: Apparence
appearance.subtitle: Personnalisez votre expérience visuelle.
appearance.accentColorDescription: Choisissez la couleur de surbrillance pour les éléments « + » et d'accentuation.
appearance.boldModeDescription: Augmente le poids de la police dans toute l'application.

accessibility.title: Accessibilité
accessibility.subtitle: Configurez les options pour rendre l'application plus accessible.
accessibility.highContrastDescription: Augmente le contraste des couleurs pour une meilleure lisibilité.
accessibility.reduceMotionDescription: Minimise les effets de mouvement et les transitions.
accessibility.focusOutline: Contour de mise au point élargi
accessibility.focusOutlineDescription: Augmente l’épaisseur des contours du focus du clavier.
accessibility.skipLinks: Toujours afficher les liens de saut
accessibility.skipLinksDescription: Rend les liens de saut de navigation visibles en permanence.
accessibility.underlineLinksDescription: Ajoute un soulignement à tous les liens pour une meilleure identification.
accessibility.screenReaderDescription: Ajoute des descriptions supplémentaires et des étiquettes ARIA enrichies.

languageRegion.title: Langue et région
languageRegion.subtitle: Choisissez votre langue et votre fuseau horaire préférés.
languageRegion.languageDescription: Sélectionnez la langue d'affichage de l'application.

account.title: Compte
account.subtitle: Gérez vos informations personnelles.
account.lockedDescription: Connectez-vous pour gérer les informations de votre compte.

security.title: Sécurité
security.subtitle: Configurez les options de sécurité de votre compte.
security.twoFactorDescription: Ajoute une couche de protection supplémentaire lors de la connexion.
security.changePasswordDescription: Mettez régulièrement à jour votre mot de passe pour assurer la sécurité de votre compte.
security.activeSessionsDescription: Afficher et mettre fin aux sessions sur d'autres appareils.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choisissez comment vous souhaitez être averti.
notifications.emailDescription: Recevez des résumés et des alertes importantes dans votre e-mail.
notifications.inAppDescription: Affiche des bannières et des badges dans l'application.
notifications.pushDescription: Recevez des alertes même lorsque l'application est fermée.
notifications.soundDescription: Joue un son lorsqu'une notification arrive.

advanced.title: Avancée
advanced.subtitle: Options avancées de maintenance des applications.
advanced.clearCacheDescription: Supprime les données temporaires stockées localement.
advanced.clearCacheConfirm: Es-tu sûr? Cela supprimera toutes les données locales temporaires.
advanced.resetSettingsDescription: Restaure tous les paramètres aux valeurs par défaut.
advanced.resetSettingsConfirm: Es-tu sûr? Toutes vos préférences seront perdues.

help.title: Aide et assistance
help.subtitle: Obtenez de l'aide, parcourez la documentation et contactez notre équipe.
help.documentationDescription: Browse guides, tutorials, and API references.
help.contactSupportDescription: Get help from our team. Usually responds within 24 hours.

faq0.question: How do I create an automation?
faq0.answer: Go to the Automations page and use the Natural Language Workflow Builder. Describe what you want to automate in plain English, and Pytomatiza+ will build the workflow for you.

faq1.question: How do I connect a new integration?
faq1.answer: Navigate to Settings → Integrations to connect third-party services like Google Workspace, Slack, or GitHub.

faq2.question: What happens if an agent fails?
faq2.answer: Failed agents are marked with an error status. You can view the error details in the agent card and retry the execution.

faq3.question: How do I change my language?
faq3.answer: Click the globe icon in the header to switch between 9 supported languages.

dashboard.title: Tableau de bord
dashboard.subtitle: Voici ce qui se passe avec vos automatisations aujourd'hui.

error.title: Erreur de chargement des données

empty.title: Aucun agent trouvé
empty.description: Créez votre premier agent d'automatisation pour commencer à voir l'activité ici.

dashboard.recentActivityEmpty: Empty history… Create your first automation with Pytomatiza+ by going to Modules!

automations.title: Automatisations
automations.subtitle: Créer et gérer des workflows d'automatisation du langage naturel

nlpBuilder.title: Générateur de flux de travail en langage naturel
nlpBuilder.description: Décrivez ce que vous souhaitez automatiser en anglais simple et Pytomatiza+ créera le flux de travail pour vous.
nlpBuilder.instructionPlaceholder: Par exemple, lorsque je reçois un e-mail d'un client avec une pièce jointe, enregistrez la pièce jointe sur Google Drive et informez-moi sur Slack.
nlpBuilder.instructionHelper: Soyez aussi précis que possible. Incluez les déclencheurs, les conditions et les actions souhaitées.
nlpBuilder.requireApprovalHelper: Lorsqu'il est activé, le flux de travail s'arrêtera pour votre examen avant de s'exécuter.
nlpBuilder.example1: Envoyez un rapport hebdomadaire de tous les tickets clôturés à la chaîne Slack de l'équipe tous les vendredis à 17h
nlpBuilder.example2: Surveillez nos mentions Twitter et répondez automatiquement aux questions d'assistance avec un lien vers le centre d'aide
nlpBuilder.example3: Lorsqu'une nouvelle ligne est ajoutée à la feuille Google « Leads », envoyez un e-mail de bienvenue personnalisé via Gmail

workflowList.title: Vos flux de travail
workflowList.empty: Aucun flux de travail pour l'instant. Créez votre premier ci-dessus.
workflowList.deleteConfirm: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce flux de travail ? Cette action ne peut pas être annulée.
workflowList.label: Workflows

errors.instructionTooShort: L'instruction doit comporter au moins 10 caractères
errors.instructionTooLong: L'instruction ne doit pas dépasser 500 caractères
errors.buildFailed: Échec de la création du flux de travail. Veuillez réessayer.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Automate intelligent document processing with AI agents

upload.title: Attach document
upload.description: Drag and drop your file here or click to select
upload.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, CSV, images

instruction.title: What should the AI agent do?
instruction.description: Describe in natural language what you want the agent to do with this document.
instruction.label: Agent instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Extract all data from the table on page 3 and convert it to a CSV spreadsheet. Then email it to finance@company.com.
instruction.helper: Be specific: include which data to extract, output format, recipients, and post-processing actions.

presets.extract: Extract all structured data from this document and export as CSV.
presets.convert: Convert this document to PDF format while preserving the original layout.
presets.merge: Merge this document with other files in the folder and generate a single unified PDF.
presets.ocr: Scan this document using OCR and extract all text in editable format.
presets.summarize: Summarize the content of this document in one paragraph with key points.
presets.translate: Translate this document to English while preserving the original formatting.

recentDocuments.title: Recent documents
recentDocuments.empty: No documents processed yet. Upload your first document above.

processing.error: Failed to process document. Please try again.
processing.reprocessInstruction: Reprocess the document {name} applying the same previous transformations.

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access and select documents directly from your Google Drive.

dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

data.title: Data & Spreadsheets
data.subtitle: Connect data sources, transform spreadsheets, and automate analysis

source.title: Data source
source.description: Choose how to connect your data

instruction.title: What to do with the data?
instruction.description: Describe the desired transformation, analysis, or automation
instruction.label: Processing instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Merge 'First Name' and 'Last Name' columns, filter records with sales over $10,000, group by region, and generate a bar chart.
instruction.helper: Include filters, aggregations, table joins, and the desired output format.

preview.title: Preview
preview.noData: Connect a data source to preview
preview.name: Name

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access spreadsheets and data files directly from your Google Drive.

errors.connectFailed: Failed to connect to data source.

results.connected: Connected successfully! Data source ready for processing.
results.transformComplete: Transformation complete! {count} records processed. The result is ready for download.
results.analyzeInstruction: Analyze the connected data and generate insights: trends, outliers, correlations, and recommendations.
results.scheduleAlert: Scheduling configured! Data will be processed automatically.

merge.label: Merge columns
merge.prompt: Merge 'Name' and 'Last Name' columns into a single 'Full Name' column.

filter.label: Filter records
filter.prompt: Filter records where 'Sales' column is greater than $10,000.

group.label: Group & summarize
group.prompt: Group data by 'Region' and calculate the sum and average of 'Sales'.

pivot.label: Pivot table
pivot.prompt: Create a pivot table with 'Category' as rows, 'Month' as columns, and sum of 'Revenue'.

chart.label: Generate chart
chart.prompt: Generate a bar chart comparing sales by region.

export.label: Export structured
export.prompt: Export the transformed data to a CSV file with UTF-8 encoding.

communication.title: Communication
communication.subtitle: Automate emails, messages, and multi-channel notifications

composer.title: Compose message
composer.description: Describe the content and the AI agent will draft the message
composer.instructionPlaceholder: e.g., Send a reminder email to all clients with invoices due in 3 days, using a professional yet friendly tone, and include the payment link.
composer.instructionHelper: Specify: message tone, information to include, personalizations, and call-to-action.

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.description: Configure who will receive the message

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.dateTimePlaceholder: Date/time picker available in the full version.

actions.testSendDescription: Send a test to verify formatting

results.draftSaved: Draft saved successfully! You can access it in 'Messages > Drafts'.
results.testSent: Test sent to {email}! Check your inbox.

errors.testNoRecipient: Please enter a recipient for the test.

media.title: Media & Images
media.subtitle: Process, convert, and optimize images and media in batch

instruction.title: What should the AI agent do with the media?
instruction.description: Describe in natural language what you want the agent to do with your images or videos.
instruction.label: Agent instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Remove the background from all images, resize to 1200x800 maintaining aspect ratio, convert to WebP at 85% quality, apply brightness +10 filter, and add '© My Company' watermark at the bottom right corner.
instruction.helper: Include: which transformations to apply, dimensions, output format, quality, filters, and watermark.

upload.title: Media upload
upload.description: Drag images or videos to get started
upload.supportedFormats: Formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, SVG, WebP, MP4, MOV, WebM

transformations.title: Transformations
transformations.description: Choose what to do with your media
transformations.watermarkDescription: Add text or logo overlay on the image

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access images and videos stored in your Google Drive.

googlePhotos.title: Google Photos
googlePhotos.description: Access your photos and albums directly from Google Photos.

results.aiInterpreted: Instruction interpreted successfully! Transformations have been pre-configured as described. Review the adjustments in the panel and click 'Process media' to apply.
results.downloadSimulation:
Simulating download of {count} processed file(s) as ZIP.

In the full version, all files would be compressed and downloaded.
results.downloadComplete: Download complete! Files removed from the list.

files.title: Files
files.subtitle: Manage, organize, and automate file operations

instruction.title: What should the AI agent do with your files?
instruction.description: Describe in natural language how you want to organize, process, or manage your files.
instruction.label: Agent instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Organize all PDFs in the Downloads folder by creation date, rename them using the pattern 'YYYY-MM-DD - original name', move invoices to /Finance/Invoices/{year}/{month}, and compress files older than 6 months.
instruction.helper: Include: which files to affect, how to organize them, renaming pattern, destination folders, and additional actions.

upload.title: File upload
upload.description: Drag files or folders to upload

files.aiPlaceholder: Ex.: Organize todos os PDFs da pasta Downloads por data de criação, renomeie com o padrão 'YYYY-MM-DD - nome original', mova faturas para /Financeiro/Faturas/{ano}/{mês} e compacte arquivos com mais de 6 meses.

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access and manage files directly from your Google Drive as if it were a local folder.

dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.moveAlert: Move "{name}" — In the full version, a folder selector would be shown.
dialogs.shareLink:
Share link for "{name}" copied to clipboard!

https://pytomatiza.app/share/{id}
dialogs.selectFile: "{label}" — Select a file in the explorer to use this action.

results.aiInterpreted: Instruction interpreted successfully! Organization rules have been created automatically. Review them in the rules panel.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Generate architecture diagrams and technical documentation with AI

diagramBuilder.title: Describe your architecture
diagramBuilder.description: Describe the system in natural language and the AI agent will generate the diagram
diagramBuilder.instructionPlaceholder: e.g., E-commerce system with: load balancer (Nginx), 3 API instances (Node.js on Kubernetes), primary PostgreSQL + read replica, Redis for caching, RabbitMQ queue for orders, Python workers, and S3 storage for product images.
diagramBuilder.instructionHelper: Include: components, connections, protocols, technologies, and data flow.

templates.title: Architecture templates
templates.description: Choose a template as a starting point

export.title: Export format
export.description: Choose how to export the diagram

actions.shareDescription: Share with your team via link

errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate diagram. Please try again.

dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this diagram?
dialogs.shareLink:
Share link copied to clipboard!

Share this architecture project with your team.

logs.title: Logs & Aprovações
logs.subtitle: Monitore execuções de automação e gerencie solicitações de aprovação pendentes.

agents.dbBackup: Agente de Backup de Banco de Dados

actions.log2: Gerou relatório semanal de vendas em PDF
actions.log3: Respondeu automaticamente a 5 menções de suporte
actions.log4: Backup noturno — verificação de integridade falhou
actions.log7: Agendou 2 sincronizações de equipe para a próxima semana
actions.log8: Traduzindo post do blog para 9 idiomas

brand.tagline: AI-powered automation that thinks, learns, and executes — so you don't have to.
brand.feature1Desc: Describe tasks in plain English. Our NLP engine builds the automation for you.
brand.feature2Desc: Specialized AI agents collaborate to handle complex, multi-step processes.
brand.feature3Desc: End-to-end encryption, role-based access, and full audit trails.
